name: white-glove-delivery-service
description: White Glove Source — premium furniture logistics for interior designers

scripts.localstack:up: bash scripts/compose-with-dev-env.sh -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.localstack.yml up -d postgres mailpit localstack
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.walkthrough:install: npm install --prefix e2e && npm exec --prefix e2e playwright install chromium
scripts.walkthrough:video: cd e2e && npx playwright test walkthrough.spec.ts
scripts.test:deploy-smoke: cd e2e && BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:5173} npx playwright test deploy-smoke.spec.ts --config playwright.deploy.config.ts
scripts.test:features: cd e2e && npx playwright test --config playwright.features.config.ts
scripts.test:features:ui: cd e2e && npx playwright test --config playwright.features.config.ts --ui
